PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transaction Transferring Assets To Petitioner And Increasing Her Community Spouse Resource Allowance
Off Calendar Feb-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Matthew O'Donnell for Petitioner.

Mr. O'Donnell presented oral argument to support his position with the petition. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Abasse.
